questionHtml:
A toy car of mass 2 kg is at rest on a horizontal surface. A force of 30 N is applied to the toy car at time t = 0. Frictional forces of 10 N act on the toy car throughout its motion.

What is the speed of the toy car at t = 2 s?


A.  10 m s−1

B.  20 m s−1

C.  30 m s−1

D.  40 m s−1
